ogTitle: Alexandra Headland vs Alexandra Hills: Climate Safety

heading: Alexandra Headland vs Alexandra Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alexandra Headland, Queensland and Alexandra Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alexandra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Alexandra Headland (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alexandra Headland or Alexandra Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alexandra Headland has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Alexandra Hills scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alexandra Headland scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Alexandra Hills scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alexandra Headland or Alexandra Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alexandra Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
